title: Senior Software Engineer - Aptech South Asia Partners - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Aptech South Asia Partners - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Aptech South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aptech South Asia Partners:
Aptech South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech South Asia Partners!
